case_title: CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY VS. MAXINE BOYKIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 66885340) TO PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-07-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($.00 ON INTEREST, $.00 ON PRINCIPAL), $195.16 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100207421) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-08-2022 CONTINUED TO FEB-07-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYKIN, MAXINE $2,410.40 PRINCIPAL, $383.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,793.40, SEE SCANNED DOC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66885340) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS, INC., ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BOYKIN, MAXINE DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-23-2022
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100165371) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE
